prompt: Create an object detection visual showing the bag from image 2 and the balloon bouquet from image 3. Represent the detected objects with bounding boxes or overlays rendered in the abstract, transparent, red geometric style of image 1.
prompt_refined: Generate an image for an object detection display. On the left, feature the yellow floral bag from image 2. On the right, feature the colorful balloon flower bouquet with the pink bow from image 3. For each detected object, render a semi-transparent, red geometric overlay that embodies the abstract, cubic style seen in image 1.
objects: yellow floral bag on the left
colorful balloon flower bouquet with pink bow on the right
semi-transparent red geometric overlay on the yellow floral bag
semi-transparent red geometric overlay on the colorful balloon flower bouquet
